issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API key or network failures.

scenarios.name: Generate image with Flux Schnell via TypeScript client
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @fal-ai/client with fal.config, fal.subscribe('fal-ai/flux/schnell', ...), correct image_size enum, and onQueueUpdate progress logs; baseline hits the wrong model id with raw fetch and omits the subscribe/config pattern entirely.

scenarios.name: Batch async image generation via queue API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses fal.queue.submit + fal.queue.result with requestId in Promise.all, the documented async pipeline; baseline parallelizes raw fetch calls and never touches the queue API.
